title: Login not working
description:
User unable to login with correct credentials.
User reports receiving an invalid session error.
Issue started after the latest system update.

title: Password reset issue
description:
Password reset email not received.
User checked spam folder but found nothing.
Attempted multiple reset requests without success.

title: Payment failed
description:
Transaction declined but money deducted.
Bank confirms the payment was processed.
User is requesting immediate refund or clarification.

title: Website loading slow
description:
Homepage takes more than 10 seconds to load.
Issue mostly occurs during peak hours.
User reports occasional timeout errors.

title: Error 500 on dashboard
description:
Internal server error when accessing dashboard.
Error appears after clicking analytics section.
Clearing cache did not resolve the issue.

title: Unable to upload file
description:
File upload fails for PDF documents.
Other file formats seem to work correctly.
User receives size limit warning despite small file.

title: Account suspended unexpectedly
description:
Account blocked without notification.
User claims no policy violation occurred.
Requesting urgent review of account status.

title: Profile picture not updating
description:
New profile image does not save.
Page refresh resets to old image.
User tried multiple browsers with same result.

title: Notification emails delayed
description:
Emails are received 1 hour late.
Delay affects password resets and alerts.
Issue started after server migration.

title: App crashes on startup
description:
Mobile app crashes immediately after opening.
Occurs on Android version 13 devices.
User reinstalled the app but issue persists.

title: Incorrect billing amount
description:
Invoice shows incorrect subscription charge.
User charged for premium plan unexpectedly.
Requesting billing adjustment and explanation.

title: Search feature not returning results
description:
Search returns empty results for valid keywords.
Issue occurs with specific category filters.
User reports feature worked previously.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description:
OTP code not working during login.
User receives code but it expires instantly.
Multiple login attempts locked the account temporarily.

title: Language translation error
description:
Some texts not properly translated.
Certain buttons remain in English.
User reports issue on mobile version only.

title: Subscription cancellation problem
description:
Unable to cancel subscription from settings.
Cancel button appears disabled.
User concerned about next billing cycle charge.

title: Dashboard data not updating
description:
Dashboard statistics are not refreshing automatically.
User sees outdated analytics from previous day.
Manual refresh temporarily fixes the issue.
